content_html: Old Vintage Computing Research REWIND and PLAY Monday, July 28, 2025 So I saw this headline ... and the first thing I thought reading it was, "Is he Deommodore 64?" (No, unfortunately, Deommodore Lenoir's jersey number is 2 , and I'm not even a 49ers fan.) No comments: Post a Comment Comments are subject to moderation. Be nice.
